task: Read Cargo.toml and src/lib.rs first. Add a public function `double(n: i32) -> i32` to src/lib.rs that returns n * 2. Complete only after cargo test passes.

validators.name: cargo_test
validators.detail:
error: current package believes it's in a workspace when it's not:
current:   /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/benchmark_runs/live_model/stub-smoke/workspaces/single_file_edit/Cargo.toml
workspace: /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/Cargo.toml

this may be fixable by adding `benchmark_runs/live_model/stub-smoke/workspaces/single_file_edit` to the `workspace.members` array of the manifest located at: /Users/mcrae/Desktop/Rasputin-1/Cargo.toml
Alternatively, to keep it out of the workspace, add the package to the `workspace.exclude` array, or add an empty `[workspace]` table to the package's manifest.
